---
title: "data quality"
format: html
---

## Quick Summaries with skimr and visdat
```{r}
library(skimr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(here)
```
```{r}
bg_chem <- read_csv(here("data/BGchem2008data.csv"))
```
```{r}
spec(bg_chem)
```


```{r}
skim(bg_chem)
```


```{r}
bg_chem %>% 
  select(Station, O2) %>% 
  group_by(Station) %>% 
  skim()
```
```{r}
bg_chem_clean <- read_csv(here("data/BGchem2008data.csv"), na = "-99")
```
```{r}
library(visdat)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
vis_dat(bg_chem_clean) + 
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0))
```
```{r}
vis_dat(bg_chem_clean, facet = Station) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0))
```

```{r}
library(pointblank)
```

 
```{r}
bg_chem_clean %>% 
    col_vals_gt(columns = O2, value = 0, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    head()
```

```{r}
bg_chem_clean %>% 
    col_vals_gt(columns = O2, value = 0, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    head()
```

```{r}
bg_chem_final <- bg_chem_clean %>% 
    col_vals_gt(columns = O2, value = 0, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    mutate(important_metric = O2 * 0.321)
```

```{r}
bg_chem_clean %>% 
    create_agent() %>% 
    col_vals_gt(vars(O2, NO3, NO2, NH4, P, Si), value = 0, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    col_vals_between(columns = vars(CTD_Salinity, Bottle_Salinity), left = 0, right = 42, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    col_vals_between(Latitude, left = -90, right = 90) %>%
    col_vals_between(Longitude, left = -180, right = 180) %>% 
    interrogate()
```


```{r}
al <- action_levels(warn_at = 1, stop_at = 10)
```


```{r}
bg_chem_clean %>% 
    create_agent(actions = al) %>% 
    col_vals_gt(vars(O2, NO3, NO2, NH4, P, Si), value = 0, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    col_vals_between(columns = vars(CTD_Salinity, Bottle_Salinity), left = 0, right = 42, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    col_vals_between(Latitude, left = -90, right = 90) %>%
    col_vals_between(Longitude, left = -180, right = 180) %>% 
    interrogate()
```
```{r}
al_latlon <- action_levels(warn_at = 1, stop_at = 5)
```

```{r}
bg_chem_clean %>% 
    create_agent(actions = al) %>% 
    col_vals_gt(vars(O2, NO3, NO2, NH4, P, Si), value = 0, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    col_vals_between(columns = vars(CTD_Salinity, Bottle_Salinity), left = 0, right = 42, na_pass = TRUE) %>% 
    col_vals_between(Latitude, left = -90, right = 90, actions = al_latlon) %>%
    col_vals_between(Longitude, left = -180, right = 180, actions = al_latlon) %>% 
    interrogate()
```
